I am very happy to give feedback and notes on your short fiction.

I have a particular eye for voice, energy, tension, character, dialogue and humour.

If you would like me to read your work, please reach out at hello[at]hanawhite[dot]com

Editing rates & turnaround times

Short stories or novel extracts

Up to 1,000 words: £70

1,000 - 3,500 words: £120

3,500 - 5,500 words: £150

Manuscripts

Full manuscript and 1:1 session up to 65,000 words: £300

Full manuscript and 1:1 session over 65,000 words: please contact for rates
